question_text: What is the capital city of the country of citizenship of a cast member of Head-On?
verification_cypher: MATCH (film {qid:'Q325648'})-[:P161]->(person)-[:P27]->(country)-[:P36]->(capital {qid:'Q64'}) RETURN film.name AS film, person.name AS person, country.name AS country, capital.name AS capital LIMIT 5
verification_rule: Verified when Cypher returns at least one row.
